name: academorix/realtime
purpose: Server-side realtime substrate — BroadcastChannel + BroadcastSubscription registry and Presence roster for typed events bridging Node emitters to browser listeners.
capabilities: BroadcastSubscription active WebSocket subscription per user
Typed event republish to the browser bus
Consumed by AI streaming + collaboration flows
when_to_use: Streaming a server-side event to the browser (AI tokens, presence, live notifications).
when_not_to_use: For point-in-time REST calls, use the standard controller-action surface via academorix/routing.
